_meta.source: Google Business Profile reviews — Universal Appliances Repair Group INC
_meta.captureMethod: Mixed: 20 via Claude in Chrome browser scrape on 2026-05-06; 56 from user-supplied screenshots and full-review images on 2026-05-06
policyNotes: Reviewer city not exposed by Google. All locations standardized to 'Orange County, CA' per project rule.
Bodies preserved verbatim including spelling/grammar issues. Use _bodyHasTypos flag to decide if light correction is acceptable for display.
All review bodies that have text are now complete (Kathy Calderon, Dave Brisbin, andrea hall full bodies sourced from missing_data/ folder).
Two reviews have no body text (Theresa Robinson is photo-only with stove image; Luci LaBue has only 'Reasonable price' + 'Washing machine repair' service tags). Useful for photo display only.
Reviewer profile photos (.webp avatars) for 13 reviewers stored at images/real/reviewer-profiles/. Each is referenced via its profilePhoto field where available.

Review photos: 7 captured as Google CDN URLs from initial browser scrape (may need re-download to local before they expire); ~12 more are visible in screenshots but need to be extracted or re-saved as separate files.

reviews.name: Jovita Osorio
reviews.body: AG was awesome! Fast and reliable! He explained everything to me and my machine is working excellent now. Thanks

reviews.name: Noelle B
reviews.body: AG of Universal Appliance Repair Group has helped our family with both our Thermador dishwasher and stove top — both times he did an excellent and professional job.
reviews._note: Has 3 photos on Google (dishwasher / stove top) — not yet captured.

reviews.name: Jennifer Trette
reviews.body: The dryer repairman was quick, efficient, and very knowledgeable. He clearly explained the issue and the fix, kept me informed throughout the process, and was friendly and professional the entire time. Great service from start to finish!

reviews.name: Lale
reviews.body: AG fixed my old GE Monogram refrigerator. Very friendly, fast and good service. Recommend

reviews.name: Marcy Kucik
reviews.body: Absolutely excellent! AG fixed my refrigerator in a timely and professional manner with great customer service. He is now my go-to for appliance repair. I highly recommend AG as your tech.

reviews.name: Cindy Montefu
reviews.body: AG has been fantastic while fixing our dryer! His work is thorough and his customer service is A+++! He will definitely be my 1st call when we need another repair! Thanks again AG!
reviews._note: Has 3 photos on Google (dryer) — not yet captured.

reviews.name: Robert Clemmons
reviews.body: They saved Christmas entertaining by coming before Christmas (though it took a couple trips)! Thank you for a job well done!

reviews.name: Wendy Henderson
reviews.body: Technician was on time and polite. Could have charged me a bunch of money for unnecessary repairs but he was honest and didn't do that. I will definitely call again when another appliance needs attention.

reviews.name: Danette Vanover
reviews.body: Have used Appliance Repair on the past. AG is a 5 star technician. On time, polite. Offered a detailed description of the problem. For a 12 year old washer the repair cost would far exceed in comparison to today's market value of a new washer. Appreciated the up front honesty. At no charged he did a minor adjustment to prevent stagnant water accumulating in the soap dispenser thus eliminating the foul order emitting in my washer. Have no problem calling AG in the future. It's reassuring to find a service with integrity that is honest up front. Thank you. D. Vanover
reviews._note: Source: danette_vanover_full_review.png. Reviewer typos preserved verbatim ('on the past' → in the past; 'no charged' → no charge; 'foul order' → foul odor). Light editing recommended for display.

reviews.name: Russell Kadota
reviews.body: A.G. arrived with the part my washing machine needed and replaced it very quickly. He was very courteous and professional.

reviews.name: Tony Tomassini
reviews.body: Our technician was top rate in terms of product knowledge so the repairs on our dishwasher and wash machine were handled efficiently and on budget. Great customer service as well — I highly recommend this company.

reviews.name: Justine Shaw
reviews.body: AG did a great job detecting and repairing my washing machine leak. He was prompt and courteous. Will use him and his company in the future.

reviews.name: Katie Holst
reviews.body: AG did a great job repairing my dishwasher. He was prompt, quick and fair. I will use him again for any future repair needs.

reviews.name: Katie Anne Salen
reviews.body: We've received fast and high quality service on our dryer each time we've needed it. The repairman is courteous and clear — we will call him again when another appliance needs repair.

reviews.name: John Dinger
reviews.body: AG was polite, on time, fairly priced and very knowledgeable.

reviews.name: Steve D
reviews.body: My cooktop burners kept clicking and sparking. We didn't feel that it was safe to use. Called AG and he quickly diagnosed the problem as a bad spark module, came out the same day, ordered the part and fixed it the next day, as soon as the part came in. He was fast, efficient, with fair pricing. He was a great communicator and kept me in the loop the whole time. Highly recommended and will use again. Thanks, AJ!
reviews._note: Source: steve_d_full_review.png. Reviewer is a Local Guide with 95 reviews and 29 photos available — owner export recommended for the photo set; would be valuable for hub pages.

reviews.name: Julie L.
reviews.body: Great experience! Our dryer was making a horrible squeaking noise. I contacted Universal Appliance, Gason called me back and was here within 30 minutes. He repaired our dryer in a timely manner and was kind and respectful. Thank you for your help.

reviews.name: Greg Schnabel
reviews.body: Work was fast and efficient. I highly recommend him.

reviews.name: Jeff Lane Songs
reviews.body: AG arrived on time and fixed the oven. Great work!
reviews._note: Google Maps listing for a music entity, not a residential customer. Do not display on hub pages.

reviews.name: Emily Palmer
reviews.body: AG was super professional, did a great job fixing my freezer and I would highly recommend him to anyone needing appliance repair!
reviews._note: Has 2 photos on Google (freezer) — not yet captured.

reviews.name: Jonathan Stone
reviews.body: MK arrived on time, quickly diagnosed and repaired our dishwasher. Great service, reasonably priced.
reviews._note: Source: review_scr_1.png. Reviewer is a Local Guide (141 reviews, 2407 photos).

reviews.name: Katherine Bosboom
reviews.body: Excellent service. Fair prices!! Highly recommend!!

reviews.name: Jonra Babiracki
reviews.body: Ag was great did a wonderful job. Was an amazing guy highly recommend

reviews.name: Kathy Calderon
reviews.body: I had a great experience with AG and this appliance repair service. The technician arrived right on time, clearly explained what might be going on with my washing machine, and gave me a fair estimate upfront. What really impressed me was his dedication—he made a special trip to pick up the needed part and came back on a Saturday morning to complete the repair. Everything is working perfectly now. Professional, courteous, and reliable—couldn't ask for better service!
reviews._note: Source: missing_data/kathy_calderon.png. Long-form review — strong testimonial for hub pages.

reviews.name: paul guns
reviews.body: Agie was terrific!! Very honest, very friendly and highly professional!! Great "customer service!!"
reviews._note: Reviewer profile shows 4 reviews · 2 photos — has photos that may be available on the listing but not in screenshots.

reviews.name: William Nugent
reviews.body: Awesome service and price!! Thank You..
reviews._note: Review photo (built-in fridge) embedded in screenshot — needs extraction.

reviews.name: susan gerakos
reviews.body: A.G. does excellent work. Very professional! Thank you

reviews.name: Michele Ohanian
reviews.body: Friendly, on time, efficient, and successful repair.
reviews._note: Review photo (front-load washer) embedded in screenshot. Reviewer has 13 reviews · 2 photos — second photo may exist on listing.

reviews.name: Roger Antonie
reviews.body: Competent and friendly service.
reviews._note: Review photo shows a high-end gas range/stove with red knobs.

reviews.name: rick deangelo
reviews.body: Prompt, professional, clean, reasonably priced — would definitely recommend him. I would give him more than five stars if I could. Will be using him in the future for sure.
reviews._note: Review photo shows a black front-load washer.

reviews.name: Dana McNeill
reviews.body: Excellent Service! PLease use this company for all your appliance repairs!

reviews.name: Jeff C
reviews.body: Always a timely and competent repair. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Cheryl Kirkpatrick
reviews.body: Very responsive, timely and professional. Price was reasonable. Would definitely use again.

reviews.name: D Light
reviews.body: Great Service. Arrived promptly, fair pricing

reviews.name: Kelly Heyden
reviews.body: We had an issue where our washing machine would not drain. AG came and was communicative about his timing. He diagnosed the problem, found the part and said he'd return the following day once he had the part. Again, he was communication the second day and completed the job in one hour. He was prompt, efficient and helped get our washing machine up and running as quickly as possible for our busy family of 4. Thank you!!
reviews._note: Source: review_scr_5.png (full text). 'communication' should be 'communicating' — preserve verbatim.

reviews.name: Satara Armstrong Charlson
reviews.body: AG was great! Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Elvin Mammadov
reviews.body: The best company in Orange County. Recommended AG technician+++++++++
reviews._note: Trailing '+++++++++' may want to be trimmed for display.

reviews.name: Craig Tudor
reviews.body: AG was awesome!
reviews._note: Review photo shows a white front-load washer/dryer.

reviews.name: Shawne King
reviews.body: Very quick to come out. Helped explore all options to save money. Had to take in to shop but quickly removed and reinstalled after just a couple days. Very responsive and kept me updated.

reviews.name: Kat Tesh
reviews.body: Job was done quickly and results are great.

reviews.name: Patricio Jr Villanueva
reviews.body: Thank you for fix my washer lg
reviews._note: Non-native English. 'fix' should be 'fixing'. Review photo shows LG front-load washer.

reviews.name: Dave Brisbin
reviews.body: Our repairman was great! On time, personable, knowledgeable, and fixed our problem. Looking to him to repair another appliance as well. We'll be back!
reviews._note: Source: missing_data/dave_brisbin.png. Service tag confirms refrigerator/freezer repair (was previously unknown appliance).

reviews.body: Thank you for fixing my microwave !!!

reviews.body: Super reliable & goes above to help solve your problems!

reviews.body: On time, knowledgeable. Clean work and reliable.

reviews.name: Brian Brassil
reviews.body: AG FIX ARE PRIDGE SAME DAY. THANK YOU
reviews._note: All-caps + typos ('ARE PRIDGE' = 'our fridge'). Display version probably wants light editing or 'sic' note.

reviews.name: Lilya Raupova
reviews.body: Thank you for fix my subzero refrigerator. Ag was on time. Changed fun motor. Fast service. I will call them again if I need something repaired!
reviews._note: Reviewer has 6 reviews · 4 photos on profile — additional photos may exist. 'fun motor' likely 'fan motor'; 'fix' should be 'fixing'.

reviews.name: Suzan Hier
reviews.body: They were fast and erricient and very pleasant. This is the second time I have used their services and will not hesitate to use them again.
reviews._note: 'erricient' = 'efficient'. Light edit recommended for display.

reviews.name: Mark Koss
reviews.body: He did a fantastic job!!! Thank you so much for your help!

reviews.name: Ernesto Ruiz
reviews.body: Awesome work, fixed my dryer, and resolved all my issues in a timely manner. Good price as well.

reviews.name: Laman Anvarli
reviews.body: Thank you for fixing my mom GE Monogram refrigerator. I recommend it fast and good service. Thank you!
reviews._note: Reviewer has 10 reviews · 11 photos. Review photo shows kitchen with built-in fridge.

reviews.name: Karen Myhra
reviews.body: Fast and effective!

reviews.body: Thank you for fixing my washer whirlpool

reviews.body: was able to accommodate evening hours and fixed the dryer at a reasonable price, would use again

reviews.body: I got my maintenance done on my washing machine and dryer.

reviews.name: George
reviews.body: He fixed the washing machine 👍
reviews._note: Body says 'washing machine' but photo shows a dishwasher with hand pointing inside. Likely the body text was about washing machine but the photo was their dishwasher repair — the same tech may have done both. Recommend treating as dishwasher for hub-page assignment since the photo is the visual.

reviews.name: Andrea Walter
reviews.body: Great, reliable and friendly service!

reviews.name: Chi Wright
reviews.body: Great job, thank you!

reviews.name: Laurie Summers
reviews.body: Wonderful service once again!!! Thank you!!!

reviews.name: Jaz A
reviews.body: Good service!

reviews.name: Diane Tweedy
reviews.body: Very quick and helpful!
reviews._note: Reviewer has 8 reviews · 3 photos.

reviews.name: Elizabeth Lovejoy
reviews.body: Great service, incredibly pleasant! We were so impressed with how quickly he both diagnosed and fixed the problem.
reviews._note: Review photo shows pink-tile counter with gas cooktop.

reviews.name: andrea hall
reviews.body: I had a great experience with this appliance repair service. AG showed up on time, quickly diagnosed the issue with my freezer, and explained everything in a way that actually made sense. No guesswork, no upselling, just straightforward, honest work. You can tell he knows what he's doing and takes pride in doing the job right the first time. Reliable, knowledgeable, and very easy to work with. I wouldn't hesitate to call him again or recommend him to others.
reviews._note: Source: missing_data/andrea_hall.png. Long-form review with strong testimonial language — good for hub pages.

reviews.name: Molla Islam
reviews.body: This guy is wonderful. Not only fixed the fridge. He took time and no rush. He cleaned everything and even before he left we heard the sound of making ice cubes. On top of that he fixed the gas flow of the burner as a courtesy. Nice guy. Very friendly and professional as well.
reviews._note: Reviewer is Local Guide with 11 reviews · 2 photos — photos may exist on listing.

reviews.name: Joellyn Meadows
reviews.body: AG was prompt, attentive and very knowledgeable about refrigeration and repairs. We have called him in the past and will continue to call for our other appliance needs.

reviews.name: Susan Ryan
reviews.body: AG replaced our oven igniter today on short notice. Very efficient and friendly. He was recommended by a friend.
reviews._note: Review photo shows stainless steel gas range.

reviews.name: Stephen Stephen
reviews.body: The gentleman was completely professional, clean, cleaned up after himself. It was an absolute pleasure having him repair my appliance — being the washer and dryer. Thank you so much

reviews.name: Dena Fisher
reviews.body: AG went above and beyond on the repair of my dryer. Not only did he fix the problem, but he also cleaned all the vents and made sure the dryer was in proper working condition.

reviews.name: cheryl lemire
reviews.body: Absolutely amazing service! Timely, cost was right, knowledgeable, great customer experience! Definitely will be using them again! Thank you! Dryer is back in action!
reviews._note: Review photo shows white front-load dryer.

reviews.name: George Mendoza
reviews.body: Thank you for fox my Samsung range
reviews._note: 'fox' is a typo for 'fix'. Light edit recommended for display.

reviews.body: Very curteous, knowledgeable and fast. Great service. Recommend him!

reviews.name: Susie Arii
reviews.body: Thank you AG for service my washer and dryer!!!

reviews._note: Photo-only review — no body text. Photo shows stainless steel pro-style range with red knobs. Useful as a hub-page image but cannot be used as a quoted testimonial.
